description.unified: Dispels harmful effects from the ally with the lowest current HP and restores HP 3 times. When healing the target, nearby allies are additionally healed for 40% of the healing amount.

Grants all allies a shield that absorbs ATK damage for [4 sec->7 sec]. While the shield lasts, the target’s ATK increases by [(added) 25%], Healing Power by [120%->65%], and Status Resistance by [800->600].

Deals ATK Magic DMG to the target and nearby enemies 6 times, then inflicts Blind for [2 sec->3.5 sec], and increases Magic DMG taken by [(added) 25% for 10 sec]. This skill applies Critical Rate [800->500] higher.

Magic DMG taken is reduced by [(added) 15%]. At the start of each battle or every [20 sec->14 sec], restores [14%->15%] of Max HP to the [2->1] allies with the lowest current HP, and increases their Magic DEF by 60*(1+0.3*Skill Level) for [15 sec->7 sec].

dark.unified: Healed allies take [40%->25%] less Magic DMG for 10 sec.

light.unified: Mana cost increases by [(added) 1000] and damage increases by [(added) 80%] [(removed) Increases the target’s Physical DMG taken by 10% for 10 sec].

dark.unified: Changes the target to random enemies [(removed) Increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by 10% for 10 sec].

light.unified: Reduces DMG the target takes from Non-Hero enemies by [(added) 40%] for the duration of Skill [(removed) Activates Goddess Grace additionally at the start of every battle].

dark.unified: Number of targets changes to [(added) 2] [(removed) Magic DMG taken by Frey is reduced by 20%].
